title: Integrate gc-arena crate with derive macro and JIT alloc hooks
body:
## What was done

Landed the **gc-arena** crate with a derive macro, licensing, docs, and hooks into JIT allocation paths so prototype objects could be traced or arena-managed.

## Why it mattered

Proved the **minimal GC baseline** for Pecan: enough machinery to experiment without committing to a parallel runtime collector in this band.

## Research conclusion

Simple arena/tracing GC is sufficient for prototype JIT; parallel GC deferred to later delivery bands.

source.subject: Add gc-arena crate with derive macro, licensing, and comprehensive documentation
